bible.title: Online Bible
bible.subtitle: Read Scripture in English (King James Version & Berean Standard Bible, 2020), Hebrew (Westminster Leningrad Codex — Tanakh), Burmese (Judson, 1835) and the Chin/Zo languages (Falam, Hakha, Mara, Matu, Mizo, Paite, Sizang, Tedim) — public-domain translations.
bible.copyFailed: Copy failed — long-press to select instead

errors.loadBible: Could not load the Bible. Please try again.

study.title: AI Bible Study
study.setupSub: Sit with experienced pastors. Ask anything. Study together.
study.planAllows: Your plan allows up to {max} pastor | Your plan allows up to {max} pastors
study.questionPlaceholder: e.g. What does John 3:16 mean for me?

msg.notAvailable: Bible Study is not available right now.

msg.filtered: A response was filtered for safety.
msg.narrationUnavailable: Narration is not available right now.
msg.shareCopied: Copied — paste it anywhere to share.
msg.shareUnsupported: Sharing not supported on this device.
msg.emailPrompt: Send the summary to which email address?
msg.pdfMobileHint: Tap ••• and choose "Open in browser" to save the PDF.
msg.pdfFailed: Could not export the PDF — try opening this page in your browser.

pastor.title: AI Pastor Chat
pastor.subtitle: A caring, Scripture-grounded companion. Your conversation is saved to your journal.
pastor.empty: Share what's on your heart. The pastor is listening. 🙏
